items.claim: Cody Gibson is a tall lanky fighter for the bantamweight division who uses his length and a good jab and teeps well.
items.quote: He's a good striker, uses his length really well. He's a tall lanky guy for the division and he uses it as such. Good jab, good teeps, often times puts out a ton of volume, works the body well

items.claim: Cody Gibson gets backed up to the cage, which takes the sting off his shots and allows opponents to negate his range.
items.quote: the problem is he does get backed up and that can cost him a lot because when you're getting backed up and you're this tall lanky fellow, it takes a lot of the sting off your shots and also it gets them to back you up to the cage where they can negate some of that range.

items.claim: Cody Gibson has solid wrestling fundamentals, scrambles well, and is active off his back with elbows.
items.quote: He's a good grappler, too. He's got really solid wrestling fundamentals. He's a good back taker and even if he's on his back, he's very active from his back. Scrambles really well, nasty elbows in the ground and pound.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is a solid grappler with better trips than traditional takedowns and a strong choke arsenal.
items.quote: he's an even better grappler. He's a solid grappler with good takedowns. His trips are actually even probably better than his traditional takedowns in my opinion. Works to advance his position really well and he's got a solid choke arsenal.

items.claim: Mohammad Said can slow down, especially if he is forced to grapple.
items.quote: Now, he can slow down. That can be a problem for him, especially if he's forced to grapple.

items.claim: Mohammad Said has good judo throws and is effective at reversing position when taken down.
items.quote: He's a good grappler, he's got good judo throws, uh works to advance his position really well, and he's really good at reversing position if somebody tries to take him down.

items.claim: Dustin Jacoby has good volume, leg kicks for accumulation, good combinations, and counter striking.
items.quote: Dustin Jacoby's a solid striker in his own right. Really good volume, really uh really really good at using his leg kicks to accumulation. He's got good combinations, good counter striking

items.claim: Dustin Jacoby possesses surprising power and a high number of knockouts.
items.quote: and surprising power. People always forget that Dustin Jacoby's powerful because he doesn't look like a power puncher, but the dude has a ton of knockouts.

items.claim: Dustin Jacoby has good takedown defense and immediately transitions to striking after stuffing takedowns.
items.quote: He's also got good takedown defense and as soon as he stuffs a takedown, he goes right into striking which makes it really hard for people who want to continually shoot takedowns.
